title: Momo's SkipHand
description:
Just a SkipHand mod.
Love EnderHand, but hate pick up blocks.
And added some features for my modpack. With CUTE FUMO! OWO
body:
This is just a simple mod that adds an item called Momo's SkipHand and some accessories to unlock more features.
There is also a cute Fumo (Virtual YouTuber Kudo Chitose from Nijisanji).
![New items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01b29b8ededbb5189abadc8cc624e72875f0fa1e.jpeg)
![Fumo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1077752da36e0346279a80007d2101de64b8e9e.png)![standing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02e3f24814007dee5af7cf37f245533ef8b28d56.gif)

Need Curios API and Geckolib.
If any bugs, please report them to me on GitHub issue.
BTW, since I have copied code from a lot of other projects (such as Mutant Monsters) and will foreseeably and continuously continue to do so, this mod is even more permissive than the stated MIT license.
